content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser, async_await, minimal_change)
C: same_order(missing_id, db.findUser, not_found, audit.log, cache.set) ∧ one_next(err)
P: missing_id_before_db → not_found_before_audit
V: promisify(db.findUser) ∧ await(audit.log)
R: ! db_err->next(err) ∧ ! missing_id_before_db
A: async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser, async/await, minimal_change).
Constraints: same validation order(missing_id, db.findUser, not_found, audit.log, cache.set) and one_next(err).
Plan: missing id check before database call then not found check before audit.
Verify: promisify(db.findUser) and await(audit.log).
Risk: high-risk db_err then next(err) and high-risk missing id check before database call.
Answer target: async/await.
